mapper.sql: id, external_subject, display_name, email, status, locale, timezone, last_login_at, authorization_version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pdp_user_account ( id, external_subject, display_name, email, status, locale, timezone, last_login_at, authorization_version, created_at, updated_at, revision ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{externalSubject}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{status}, #{locale}, #{timezone}, #{lastLoginAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, #{authorizationVersion}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_user_account SET display_name = #{displayName}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, locale = #{locale}, timezone = #{timezone}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, authorization_version = #{authorizationVersion}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
